text.div:
Narrativa gerada: ImplementationGuide hl7.fhir.pt.terminology

TerminologyPT

O URL oficial para este guia de implementação é: 

http://hl7.pt/fhir/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.pt.terminology

Example IG exercises many of the fields in a SUSHI configuration.

resource.name: Orphanet Rare Disease Classification
resource.description:
Orphanet classification of rare diseases. Contains all entities from the 34
Orphanet classification trees, with hierarchical parent-child relationships.
Source: Orphadata CC BY 4.0 (https://www.orphadata.com)
Codes are Orphanet ORPHA numbers (e.g., ORPHA:98050).
